      _ ≤ ∑ x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100, x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset h₁
      _ = 4905 := by native_decide
      _ < 946 := by norm_num
  -- By pigeonhole, since 2^10 = 1024 > 946, two subsets have the same sum
  have hex : ∃ T₁ ∈ S.powerset, ∃ T₂ ∈ S.powerset, T₁ ≠ T₂ ∧ ∑ x ∈ T₁, x = ∑ x ∈ T₂, x := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have hinj : Set.InjOn (fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x) S.powerset := by
      intro T₁ hT₁ T₂ hT₂ heq
      by_contra hne
      exact hne (h T₁ hT₁ T₂ hT₂ hne heq).symm
    have := Finset.card_le_card_of_injOn (fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x) hinj (by simp)

      apply Finset.card_le_card

      simp only [Finset.mem_image] at hn
      obtain ⟨T, hT, rfl⟩ := hn
      simp only [Finset.mem_range]
      exact hsum_bound T hT
    omega
  obtain ⟨T₁, hT₁mem, T₂, hT₂mem, hne, heq⟩ := hex
  rw [Finset.mem_powerset] at hT₁mem hT₂mem
  use T₁ \ T₂, T₂ \ T₁
  refine ⟨?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hT₁mem, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hT₂mem, 
          Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
    intro h
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    have : T₂ \ T₁ = ∅ := by
      rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
      exact Finset.Subset.antisymm (h.trans (Finset.subset_refl T₂)) h ▸ Finset.Subset.refl T₁
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at this
    exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm h this)
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
    intro h
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    have : T₁ \ T₂ = ∅ := by
      rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
      exact Finset.Subset.antisymm (h.trans (Finset.subset_refl T₁)) h ▸ Finset.Subset.refl T₂
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at this
    exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm this h)
  · have h1 : ∑ x ∈ T₁ \ T₂, x + ∑ x ∈ T₁ ∩ T₂, x = ∑ x ∈ T₁, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter T₁ T₂)]
      congr 1
      ext x
      simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_inter, Finset.mem_union]
      tauto

      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter T₂ T₁)]
      congr 1
      ext x
      simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_inter, Finset.mem_union]
      tauto
    rw [Finset.inter_comm] at h2
    omega

have h_card_powerset : (S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty)).card = 2^10 - 1 := by
    rw [Finset.filter_nonempty_eq_erase_powerset, Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.empty_mem_powerset _)]
    simp [h₀]
  -- There are 1023 nonempty subsets, but sums range in [10, 945]
  -- By pigeonhole, two distinct nonempty subsets have the same sum
  have h_exists : ∃ A B : Finset ℕ, A ⊆ S ∧ B ⊆ S ∧ A.Nonempty ∧ B.Nonempty ∧ A ≠ B ∧ 
      ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ B, x := by
    by_contra h_neg
    push_neg at h_neg
    have h_inj : ∀ A ∈ S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty), ∀ B ∈ S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty), 
        ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ B, x → A = B := by
      intro A hA B hB hsum
      simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
      by_contra hne
      exact h_neg A B hA.1 hB.1 hA.2 hB.2 hne hsum
    have h_card_le : (S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty)).card ≤ (Finset.Icc 10 945).card := by
      apply Finset.card_le_card_of_injOn (fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x)
      · intro T hT
        simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hT
        simp only [Finset.mem_Icc]
        constructor
        · obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hT.2
          calc ∑ y ∈ T, y ≥ ∑ _ ∈ ({x} : Finset ℕ), x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset (Finset.singleton_subset_iff.mpr hx)
            _ = x := Finset.sum_singleton
            _ ≥ 10 := by have := hT.1 hx; simp only [Finset.mem_Ico] at this; omega
        · calc ∑ y ∈ T, y ≤ ∑ y ∈ S, y := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset hT.1
            _ ≤ ∑ _ ∈ S, 99 := Finset.sum_le_sum (fun x hx => by have := h₁ hx; simp at this; omega)
            _ = 10 * 99 := by simp [h₀]
            _ = 990 := by norm_num
            _ ≤ 945 := by omega
      · exact h_inj
    simp only [Finset.card_Icc, h_card_powerset] at h_card_le
    omega
  obtain ⟨A, B, hAS, hBS, hAne, hBne, hAB, hsum⟩ := h_exists
  use A \ B, B \ A
  refine ⟨?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hAS, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hBS, Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · by_contra h
    simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    have : B ⊆ A := by
      by_contra hBA
      push_neg at hBA
      simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
      have hAsubB : A ⊆ B := h
      have : A = B := Finset.Subset.antisymm hAsubB (by
        by_contra hBnA
        have : (B \ A).Nonempty := Finset.sdiff_nonempty.mpr (fun hBA => hBnA hBA)
        obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
        simp at hx
        have := hAsubB hx.1
        exact hx.2 this)
      exact hAB this
    exact hAB (Finset.Subset.antisymm h this)
  · by_contra h
    simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    have : A ⊆ B := by
      by_contra hAB'
      simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
      have hBsubA : B ⊆ A := h  
      have : B = A := Finset.Subset.antisymm hBsubA (by
        by_contra hAnB
        have : (A \ B).Nonempty := Finset.sdiff_nonempty.mpr (fun hAB => hAnB hAB)
        obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
        simp at hx
        have := hBsubA hx.1
        exact hx.2 this)
      exact hAB this.symm
    exact hAB (Finset.Subset.antisymm this h)
  · have eq1 : ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x + ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x = ∑ x ∈ A, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter A B)]
      congr 1; ext; simp; tauto
    have eq2 : ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x + ∑ x ∈ B ∩ A, x = ∑ x ∈ B, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter B A)]
      congr 1; ext; simp; tauto
    have : A ∩ B = B ∩ A := Finset.inter_comm A B
    omega

have h_pow : S.powerset.card = 2 ^ 10 := by rw [Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
  -- Maximum possible sum is 90+91+...+99 = 945
  have h_sum_bound : ∀ T ∈ S.powerset, ∑ x ∈ T, x < 946 := by
    intro T hT
    rw [Finset.mem_powerset] at hT
    calc ∑ x ∈ T, x ≤ ∑ x ∈ S, x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset hT
      _ ≤ ∑ x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100, x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset h₁
      _ = 4905 := by native_decide
      _ < 946 + 4000 := by norm_num
      _ > _ := by omega
  -- By pigeonhole, two subsets have same sum (since 2^10 = 1024 > 946)
  have h_pigeonhole : ∃ A ∈ S.powerset, ∃ B ∈ S.powerset, A ≠ B ∧ ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ B, x := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h_inj : Function.Injective (fun T : S.powerset => (⟨∑ x ∈ T.val, x, by
        have := h_sum_bound T.val T.prop
        omega⟩ : Fin 946)) := by
      intro ⟨A, hA⟩ ⟨B, hB⟩ heq
      simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Fin.mk.injEq] at heq ⊢
      by_cases hab : A = B
      · exact hab
      · exact absurd heq (h A hA B hB hab)
    have := Fintype.card_le_of_injective _ h_inj
    simp only [Fintype.card_coe, Fintype.card_fin, h_pow] at this
    omega
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, heq⟩ := h_pigeonhole
  rw [Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
  use A \ B, B \ A
  refine ⟨?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hA, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hB, 
          Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
    intro h
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    have : B \ A ≠ ∅ := by
      rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
      intro h'
      exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm h h')
    rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty] at this
    exact this (by rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]; exact h)
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
    intro h
    have : A \ B ≠ ∅ := by
      rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]
      intro h'
      exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm h' h)
    rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty] at this
    exact this (by rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset]; exact h)
  · have := Finset.sum_sdiff_eq_sum_sdiff_iff (s := A) (t := B)
    rw [this]
    exact heq

have h_pow : S.powerset.card = 2 ^ 10 := by rw [Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
  -- The number of nonempty subsets is 2^10 - 1 = 1023
  have h_nonempty_count : (S.powerset.filter Finset.Nonempty).card = 1023 := by
    rw [Finset.filter_nonempty_eq_erase_powerset, Finset.card_erase_of_mem]
    · simp [h_pow]
    · simp
  -- Each element is between 10 and 99, so sums are bounded
  -- Maximum sum ≤ 90+91+...+99 = 945, minimum sum ≥ 10
  -- So sums ∈ [10, 945], which has at most 936 values
  -- But 1023 > 936, so by pigeonhole, two distinct nonempty subsets have the same sum
  -- If A ≠ B are nonempty with same sum, then A \ B and B \ A are disjoint with same sum
  have key : ∃ A B : Finset ℕ, A.Nonempty ∧ A ⊆ S ∧ B.Nonempty ∧ B ⊆ S ∧ A ≠ B ∧ 
             ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ B, x := by
    by_contra h_contra
    push_neg at h_contra
    -- pigeonhole on sums
    have h_inj : ∀ A ∈ S.powerset.filter Finset.Nonempty, ∀ B ∈ S.powerset.filter Finset.Nonempty,
        ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ B, x → A = B := by
      intro A hA B hB heq
      simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
      by_contra hne
      exact h_contra A B hA.2 hA.1 hB.2 hB.1 hne heq
    have h_bound : ∀ A ∈ S.powerset.filter Finset.Nonempty, ∑ x ∈ A, x ∈ Finset.Icc 10 945 := by
      intro A hA
      simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA
      simp only [Finset.mem_Icc]
      constructor
      · have ⟨a, ha⟩ := hA.2
        calc ∑ x ∈ A, x ≥ ∑ _ ∈ ({a} : Finset ℕ), 1 * 10 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg (Finset.singleton_subset_iff.mpr ha)
          intro i hi _; exact le_of_lt (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hA.1 hi))).1
        _ = 10 := by simp
      · calc ∑ x ∈ A, x ≤ ∑ x ∈ S, x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset hA.1
        _ ≤ ∑ _ ∈ S, 99 := Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i hi => Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ hi)).2)
        _ = 10 * 99 := by rw [Finset.sum_const, h₀]; simp
        _ = 990 := by norm_num
        _ ≤ 945 := by norm_num
    sorry
  obtain ⟨A, B, hA_ne, hA_sub, hB_ne, hB_sub, hne, heq⟩ := key
  use A \ B, B \ A
  refine ⟨?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hA_sub, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hB_sub, 
          Finset.disjoint_sdiff_self_left.trans_eq Finset.sdiff_self, ?_⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
    intro h
    have : A ⊆ B := Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp h
    have : B ⊆ A := by
      have := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset (s₂ := A) this
      omega
    exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm ‹A ⊆ B› ‹B ⊆ A›)
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
    intro h
    have : B ⊆ A := Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp h
    have : A ⊆ B := by
      have := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset (s₂ := B) this
      omega
    exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm ‹A ⊆ B› ‹B ⊆ A›)
  · have : ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x = ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x := rfl
    have hA_split : ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x + ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter A B)]
      congr 1; ext; simp [or_and_left]; tauto
    have hB_split : ∑ x ∈ B, x = ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x + ∑ x ∈ B ∩ A, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter B A)]
      congr 1; ext; simp [or_and_left]; tauto
    rw [Finset.inter_comm] at hB_split
    omega

have hcard : (S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty)).card = 2 ^ 10 - 1 := by
    rw [Finset.filter_nonempty_powerset, Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.empty_mem_powerset S),
        Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
  have h2 : ∀ T ∈ S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty), ∑ x ∈ T, x ∈ Finset.Icc 10 945 := by
    intro T hT
    simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hT
    obtain ⟨hTS, hTne⟩ := hT
    refine Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hTne
      calc ∑ x ∈ T, x ≥ t := Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _) ht
        _ ≥ 10 := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hTS ht))).1
    · calc ∑ x ∈ T, x ≤ ∑ x ∈ S, x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset hTS
        _ ≤ 10 * 99 := by
          have : ∀ x ∈ S, x ≤ 99 := fun x hx => (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ hx)).2.sub_one
          calc ∑ x ∈ S, x ≤ ∑ _ ∈ S, 99 := Finset.sum_le_sum fun x hx => this x hx
            _ = 10 * 99 := by simp [h₀]
        _ ≤ 945 := by norm_num
  have hpig : (Finset.Icc 10 945).card < (S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty)).card := by
    simp only [Finset.card_Icc, hcard]
    norm_num
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, hsum⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to hpig h2
  simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
  refine ⟨A \ B, B \ A, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · by_contra h
    simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    have : A = B := Finset.Subset.antisymm h (by
      by_contra h'
      simp only [Finset.not_subset] at h'
      obtain ⟨x, hxB, hxnA⟩ := h'
      have : ∑ y ∈ A, y < ∑ y ∈ B, y := by
        calc ∑ y ∈ A, y ≤ ∑ y ∈ B, y - x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg
            (fun a ha => by simp [h ha, ha]) (fun _ _ _ => Nat.zero_le _)
          _ < ∑ y ∈ B, y := Nat.sub_lt (Finset.sum_pos (fun y hy => 
              (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hB.1 hy))).1) hB.2) 
              ((Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hB.1 hxB))).1)
      omega)
    exact hne this
  · exact Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hA.1
  · by_contra h
    simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    have : B = A := Finset.Subset.antisymm h (by
      by_contra h'
      simp only [Finset.not_subset] at h'
      obtain ⟨x, hxA, hxnB⟩ := h'
      have : ∑ y ∈ B, y < ∑ y ∈ A, y := by
        calc ∑ y ∈ B, y ≤ ∑ y ∈ A, y - x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg
            (fun a ha => by simp [h ha, ha]) (fun _ _ _ => Nat.zero_le _)
          _ < ∑ y ∈ A, y := Nat.sub_lt (Finset.sum_pos (fun y hy => 
              (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hA.1 hy))).1) hA.2) 
              ((Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ (hA.1 hxA))).1)
      omega)
    exact hne this.symm
  · exact Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hB.1
  · exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff
  · have := Finset.sum_sdiff_eq_sum_sdiff_of_sum_eq hsum
    convert this using 1 <;> simp [Finset.sum_sdiff_inter]

have h2 : (S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty)).card = 1023 := by
    rw [Finset.filter_nonempty_powerset, h₀]; rfl
  have h3 : ∀ T ∈ S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty), ∑ x ∈ T, x ∈ Finset.Icc 1 945 := by
    intro T hT
    simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset, Finset.mem_Icc] at hT ⊢
    exact ⟨Finset.sum_pos (fun i hi => by have := h₁ (hT.1 hi); simp at this; omega) hT.2,
           Nat.le_trans (Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset (Finset.Subset.trans hT.1 h₁)) (by native_decide)⟩
  have h4 : 945 < 1023 := by norm_num
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, heq⟩ := Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to
    (by rw [h2, Finset.card_Icc]; exact h4) h3
  simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
  refine ⟨A \ B, B \ A, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hA.1, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hB.1,
          Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · by_contra h; simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    by_contra h'; simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h'
    exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm (h' ▸ Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp h' : B ⊆ A) h)
  · by_contra h; simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    by_contra h'; simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h'
    have := Finset.Subset.antisymm h (h' ▸ Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp h' : A ⊆ B)
    exact hne this
  · have := Finset.sum_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_left (s₁ := A) (s₂ := B))
    have := Finset.sum_sdiff (Finset.inter_subset_right (s₁ := A) (s₂ := B))
    rw [Finset.inter_comm] at *
    omega

have hcard : (S.powerset).card = 2 ^ 10 := by rw [Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
  -- The sum function on subsets
  let f : Finset ℕ → ℕ := fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x
  -- Maximum possible sum is bounded
  have hbound : ∀ T ∈ S.powerset, f T < 946 := by
    intro T hT
    rw [Finset.mem_powerset] at hT
    calc f T = ∑ x ∈ T, x := rfl
      _ ≤ ∑ x ∈ S, x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset hT
      _ ≤ ∑ x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100, x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset h₁
      _ = 4905 := by native_decide
      _ < 946 + 4000 := by norm_num
  -- By pigeonhole, since 2^10 = 1024 > 946, two subsets have the same sum
  have hpigeonhole : ∃ A ∈ S.powerset, ∃ B ∈ S.powerset, A ≠ B ∧ f A = f B := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have hinj : Set.InjOn f S.powerset := fun a ha b hb hab => by
      by_contra hne; exact hne (h a ha b hb hne hab)
    have := Finset.card_le_card (Finset.image_subset_range f S.powerset (s := Finset.range 946) 
      (by intro x hx; exact hbound x hx))
    rw [Finset.card_image_of_injOn hinj, hcard, Finset.card_range] at this
    omega
  obtain ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, hsum⟩ := hpigeonhole
  rw [Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
  use A \ B, B \ A
  refine ⟨?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hA, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hB, 
          Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · by_contra hempty
    simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at hempty
    have : A ⊆ B := Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp hempty
    have : A = B := Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le this (by
      have : ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ B, x := hsum
      omega)
    exact hne this
  · by_contra hempty
    simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at hempty
    have : B ⊆ A := Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp hempty
    have : B = A := Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le this (by omega)
    exact hne this.symm
  · have h1 : ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x + ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x = ∑ x ∈ A, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter A B)]
      congr 1; ext; simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_inter]; tauto
    have h2 : ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x + ∑ x ∈ B ∩ A, x = ∑ x ∈ B, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter B A)]
      congr 1; ext; simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_inter]; tauto
    have h3 : A ∩ B = B ∩ A := Finset.inter_comm A B
    omega

have h_powerset_card : S.powerset.card = 2 ^ 10 := by rw [Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
  -- Map each subset to its sum; by pigeonhole we get two with same sum
  let f : Finset ℕ → ℕ := fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x
  -- There are 2^10 = 1024 subsets, sums range from 0 to at most 945
  -- Two distinct subsets must have same sum
  have h_exists : ∃ A B : Finset ℕ, A ∈ S.powerset ∧ B ∈ S.powerset ∧ A ≠ B ∧ f A = f B := by
    by_contra h_no
    push_neg at h_no
    have h_inj : Set.InjOn f S.powerset := fun A hA B hB hfAB => by
      by_contra hne; exact h_no A B hA hB hne hfAB
    have h_image_card := Set.InjOn.card_image h_inj
    have h_bound : (f '' S.powerset).card ≤ 946 := by
      apply Finset.card_image_le.trans
      simp [h_powerset_card]
    omega
  obtain ⟨A, B, hAS, hBS, hAB_ne, hfAB⟩ := h_exists
  rw [Finset.mem_powerset] at hAS hBS
  use A \ B, B \ A
  refine ⟨?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hAS, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hBS, 
          Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
    intro h
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    have hBA : B ⊆ A := by
      by_contra hBA_not
      rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at hBA_not
      push_neg at hBA_not
      exact hBA_not (Finset.subset_antisymm h hBA_not.1).symm
    exact hAB_ne (Finset.subset_antisymm h hBA)
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
    intro h
    rw [Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at h
    have hAB : A ⊆ B := by
      by_contra hAB_not
      push_neg at hAB_not
      have : A \ B ≠ ∅ := Finset.sdiff_ne_empty_iff_exists_mem_sdiff.mpr (by
        rw [Finset.not_subset] at hAB_not
        exact hAB_not)
      exact this (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mpr h)
    exact hAB_ne (Finset.subset_antisymm hAB h)
  · have key : ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x + ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter A B |>.symm), 
          Finset.inter_union_sdiff_eq_self |>.symm, Finset.sdiff_union_inter]
    have key2 : ∑ x ∈ B, x = ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x + ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter B A |>.symm),
          Finset.inter_union_sdiff_eq_self |>.symm, Finset.sdiff_union_inter,
          Finset.inter_comm]
    simp only [f] at hfAB
    omega

have hcard : (S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty)).card = 2^10 - 1 := by
    rw [Finset.filter_nonempty_powerset, h₀]
    simp
  -- The sum of any nonempty subset is between 10 and 945
  -- We have 1023 nonempty subsets, sums range in a smaller set
  -- By pigeonhole, two subsets have the same sum
  have : ∃ A B : Finset ℕ, A ∈ S.powerset ∧ B ∈ S.powerset ∧ 
         A.Nonempty ∧ B.Nonempty ∧ A ≠ B ∧ A.sum id = B.sum id := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have hinj : ∀ A ∈ S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty), ∀ B ∈ S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty), 
                A.sum id = B.sum id → A = B := by
      intro A hA B hB heq
      simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
      exact h A B hA.1 hB.1 hA.2 hB.2 heq
    have hle : (S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty)).card ≤ (Finset.Ico 10 946).card := by
      apply Finset.card_le_card_of_injOn (fun T => T.sum id) 
      · intro T hT
        simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hT
        simp only [Finset.mem_Ico]
        constructor
        · obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hT.2
          have hxS : x ∈ S := hT.1 hx
          have : 10 ≤ x := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp (h₁ hxS)).1
          calc T.sum id ≥ x := Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _) hx
               _ ≥ 10 := this
        · calc T.sum id ≤ S.sum id := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset hT.1
             _ ≤ (Finset.Ico 90 100).sum id := by
                 have : S.sum id ≤ 90 + 91 + 92 + 93 + 94 + 95 + 96 + 97 + 98 + 99 := by
                   calc S.sum id ≤ (Finset.Ico 10 100).sum id := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset h₁
                        _ = 4905 := by native_decide
                 omega
             _ < 946 := by native_decide
      · intro A hA B hB heq
        exact hinj A hA B hB heq
    simp only [Finset.card_Ico] at hle
    omega
  obtain ⟨A, B, hAp, hBp, hAne, hBne, hAB, hsum⟩ := this
  simp only [Finset.mem_powerset] at hAp hBp
  use A \ B, B \ A
  refine ⟨?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hAp, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hBp, 
          Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · rw [Finset.sdiff_nonempty]
    intro h
    have : B \ A = ∅ := by
      ext x
      simp only [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.not_mem_empty, iff_false, not_and, Decidable.not_not]
      intro hxB
      exact h hxB
    have hBeqA : B ⊆ A := by simpa using this
    have hAeqB : A ⊆ B := h
    exact hAB (Finset.Subset.antisymm hAeqB hBeqA)
  · rw [Finset.sdiff_nonempty]
    intro h
    have : A \ B = ∅ := by
      ext x
      simp only [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.not_mem_empty, iff_false, not_and, Decidable.not_not]
      intro hxA
      exact h hxA
    have hAeqB : A ⊆ B := by simpa using this
    have hBeqA : B ⊆ A := h
    exact hAB (Finset.Subset.antisymm hAeqB hBeqA)
  · have := Finset.sum_sdiff_eq_sum_sdiff_iff (f := id) (s := A) (t := B)
    simp only [id_eq] at this ⊢
    rw [this]
    exact hsum

have h_pow : S.powerset.card = 2 ^ 10 := by rw [Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
  -- The number of nonempty subsets is 2^10 - 1 = 1023
  let nonempty_subs := S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty)
  have h_card_nonempty : nonempty_subs.card = 2 ^ 10 - 1 := by
    simp only [nonempty_subs, Finset.filter_nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
    rw [Finset.card_filter_ne_eq_card_sub_one (Finset.empty_mem_powerset S), h_pow]
  -- Each element is at least 10, so sum of any nonempty subset is ≥ 10
  -- Each element is at most 99, and we have at most 10 elements, so sum ≤ 990
  -- Actually, max sum ≤ 90+91+...+99 = 945
  -- Map each nonempty subset to its sum; range is in Finset.Ico 10 991 (at most 981 values)
  -- But 1023 > 981, so by pigeonhole two subsets have same sum
  have : ∃ A B : Finset ℕ, A ∈ nonempty_subs ∧ B ∈ nonempty_subs ∧ A ≠ B ∧ 
         ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ B, x := by
    by_contra h_contra
    push_neg at h_contra
    have h_inj : Set.InjOn (fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x) nonempty_subs := by
      intro A hA B hB heq
      by_contra hne
      exact h_contra A B hA hB hne heq
    have h_upper : ∀ T ∈ nonempty_subs, ∑ x ∈ T, x < 991 := by
      intro T hT
      simp only [nonempty_subs, Finset.mem_filter] at hT
      calc ∑ x ∈ T, x ≤ ∑ _ ∈ T, 99 := Finset.sum_le_sum (fun x hx => by
             have : x ∈ S := Finset.mem_powerset.mp hT.1 hx
             have := h₁ this; simp at this; omega)
           _ = 99 * T.card := by simp [mul_comm]
           _ ≤ 99 * 10 := by have := Finset.card_le_card (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hT.1); omega
           _ < 991 := by norm_num
    have h_lower : ∀ T ∈ nonempty_subs, 10 ≤ ∑ x ∈ T, x := by
      intro T hT
      simp only [nonempty_subs, Finset.mem_filter] at hT
      obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hT.2
      calc ∑ x ∈ T, x ≥ t := Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _) ht
           _ ≥ 10 := by have := h₁ (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hT.1 ht); simp at this; omega
    have h_image_card := Finset.card_image_of_injOn h_inj
    have h_image_sub : Finset.image (fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x) nonempty_subs ⊆ Finset.Ico 10 991 := by
      intro s hs
      simp only [Finset.mem_image] at hs
      obtain ⟨T, hT, rfl⟩ := hs
      simp only [Finset.mem_Ico]
      exact ⟨h_lower T hT, h_upper T hT⟩
    have := Finset.card_le_card h_image_sub
    simp only [Finset.card_Ico] at this
    rw [h_image_card, h_card_nonempty] at this
    omega
  obtain ⟨A, B, hA, hB, hne, heq⟩ := this
  simp only [nonempty_subs, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
  use A \ B, B \ A
  refine ⟨?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hA.1, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hB.1, 
          Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · rw [Finset.sdiff_nonempty]
    intro hAB
    have : A = B := Finset.Subset.antisymm hAB (by
      have := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset hAB
      rw [heq] at this
      exact Finset.eq_of_subset_of_sum_le_sum hAB (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _) this)
    exact hne this
  · rw [Finset.sdiff_nonempty]
    intro hBA
    have : B = A := Finset.Subset.antisymm hBA (by
      have := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset hBA
      rw [← heq] at this
      exact Finset.eq_of_subset_of_sum_le_sum hBA (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _) this)
    exact hne this.symm
  · have hA_eq : ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x + ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter A B)]
      congr 1; ext; simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_inter]; tauto
    have hB_eq : ∑ x ∈ B, x = ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x + ∑ x ∈ B ∩ A, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter B A)]
      congr 1; ext; simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_inter]; tauto
    rw [Finset.inter_comm] at hB_eq
    omega
native_decide

have hcard : (S.powerset).card = 2^10 := by simp [Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
  -- The sum function on subsets of S takes values in a range
  -- Max possible sum is 90+91+...+99 = 945, min is 0
  -- We have 1024 subsets but sums in range [0, 945], so pigeonhole gives two with same sum
  have : ∃ A B : Finset ℕ, A ∈ S.powerset ∧ B ∈ S.powerset ∧ A ≠ B ∧ 
         ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ B, x := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have hinj : Function.Injective (fun T : S.powerset => ∑ x ∈ T.val, x) := by
      intro ⟨A, hA⟩ ⟨B, hB⟩ heq
      simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq]
      by_contra hne
      exact hne (h A B hA hB hne ▸ heq)
    have hle : S.powerset.card ≤ (Finset.range 946).card := by
      calc S.powerset.card = (S.powerset.attach).card := (Finset.card_attach).symm
        _ ≤ (Finset.range 946).card := by
          apply Finset.card_le_card_of_injOn (fun T => ∑ x ∈ T.val, x)
          · intro ⟨T, hT⟩ _
            simp only [Finset.mem_range]
            have hT' : T ⊆ S := Finset.mem_powerset.mp hT
            calc ∑ x ∈ T, x ≤ ∑ x ∈ S, x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset hT'
              _ ≤ ∑ x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100, x := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset h₁
              _ = 4905 := by native_decide
              _ < 946 := by omega
          · intro ⟨A, hA⟩ _ ⟨B, hB⟩ _ heq
            simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq]
            exact hinj (Subtype.ext_iff.mpr heq)
    simp only [hcard, Finset.card_range] at hle
    omega
  obtain ⟨A, B, hA, hB, hne, hsum⟩ := this
  rw [Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
  use A \ B, B \ A
  refine ⟨?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hA, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hB, 
          Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · by_contra hemp
    simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at hemp
    have : B ⊆ A := by
      have hBA := Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp (Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp ?_)
      · exact hBA
      · by_contra hemp'
        rw [Finset.not_not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at hemp'
        have : A = B := Finset.Subset.antisymm hemp (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp 
               (Finset.eq_empty_of_subset_empty (Finset.sdiff_subset_sdiff_left hemp ▸ hemp'))) 
        exact hne this
    exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm hemp this)
  · by_contra hemp
    simp only [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty, Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset] at hemp
    have hAsub : A ⊆ B := hemp
    have : A \ B = ∅ := Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mpr hAsub
    have : B \ A = ∅ := by
      by_contra hne'
      rw [Finset.ne_empty_iff_nonempty] at hne'
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hne'
      simp only [Finset.mem_sdiff] at hx
      have hxB := hx.1
      have hxnA := hx.2
      have : ∑ y ∈ A, y < ∑ y ∈ B, y := by
        apply Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_subset hAsub
        · intro i hi
          have : i ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := hB hi
          simp only [Finset.mem_Ico] at this
          omega
        · exact ⟨x, hxB, hxnA, by have := hB hxB; simp only [Finset.mem_Ico] at this; omega⟩
      omega
    exact hne (Finset.Subset.antisymm hAsub (Finset.sdiff_eq_empty_iff_subset.mp this))
  · have : ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x + ∑ x ∈ A \ B, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff)]
      congr 1
      ext x
      simp [Finset.mem_union, Finset.mem_inter, Finset.mem_sdiff]
      tauto
    have : ∑ x ∈ B, x = ∑ x ∈ A ∩ B, x + ∑ x ∈ B \ A, x := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff)]
      congr 1
      ext x
      simp [Finset.mem_union, Finset.mem_inter, Finset.mem_sdiff]
      tauto
    omega

have card_powerset : (S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty)).card = 2^10 - 1 := by
    rw [Finset.filter_nonempty_powerset, Finset.card_powerset, h₀]
  -- Maximum sum is 90+91+...+99 = 945, minimum nonempty sum is ≥ 10
  -- So at most 936 possible sums, but 1023 nonempty subsets
  have : ∃ A B : Finset ℕ, A ∈ S.powerset ∧ B ∈ S.powerset ∧ 
         A.Nonempty ∧ B.Nonempty ∧ A ≠ B ∧ A.sum id = B.sum id := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have inj : ∀ A ∈ S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty), ∀ B ∈ S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty),
        A.sum id = B.sum id → A = B := by
      intro A hA B hB heq
      simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
      by_contra hne
      exact h A B hA.1 hB.1 hA.2 hB.2 hne heq
    have bound : (S.powerset.filter (·.Nonempty)).card ≤ (Finset.Ico 10 946).card := by
      apply Finset.card_le_card_of_injOn (fun T => T.sum id) 
      · intro T hT
        simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_powerset] at hT
        simp only [Finset.mem_Ico]
        constructor
        · obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hT.2
          have : 10 ≤ x := by have := hT.1 hx; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at this; omega
          calc T.sum id ≥ x := Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _) hx
               _ ≥ 10 := this
        · calc T.sum id ≤ S.sum id := Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset hT.1
             _ ≤ (Finset.Ico 90 100).sum id := by
                 apply Finset.sum_le_sum_of_ne_zero
                 intro x hx _
                 have := h₁ hx
                 simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at this ⊢; omega
             _ = 945 := by native_decide
             _ < 946 := by omega
      · exact inj
    simp at bound card_powerset
    omega
  obtain ⟨A, B, hA, hB, hAne, hBne, hAB, hsum⟩ := this
  simp only [Finset.mem_powerset] at hA hB
  use A \ B, B \ A
  refine ⟨?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hA, ?_, Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hB, Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, ?_⟩
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_sdiff]
    by_contra h; push_neg at h
    have : B ⊆ A := by
      by_contra hBA; push_neg at hBA
      have : (B \ A).Nonempty := Finset.nonempty_sdiff.mpr hBA
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
      simp at hx
      exact hx.2 (h hx.1)
    have : A = B := Finset.Subset.antisymm h this
    exact hAB this
  · rw [Finset.nonempty_sdiff]
    by_contra h; push_neg at h
    have : A ⊆ B := by
      by_contra hAB'; push_neg at hAB'
      have : (A \ B).Nonempty := Finset.nonempty_sdiff.mpr hAB'
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
      simp at hx
      exact hx.2 (h hx.1)
    have : A = B := Finset.Subset.antisymm this h
    exact hAB this
  · have : (A ∩ B).sum id + (A \ B).sum id = A.sum id := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter.symm), Finset.union_sdiff_inter]
    have : (A ∩ B).sum id + (B \ A).sum id = B.sum id := by
      rw [← Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter.symm), Finset.union_sdiff_inter]
    omega
